title: HMobs
description: Various animals, each having unique features!
body:
# 🐾 HMobs — Wild Adventures Await!

Bring your world to life with **HMobs**, a growing wildlife-focused expansion for Minecraft.  
Encounter majestic creatures across different biomes — from the powerful **Brown Bear** roaming forests, to the fierce **Lion** ruling the savannas, and packs of cunning **Hyenas** prowling the plains.

Each mob comes with its own unique behavior, sounds, and atmosphere, designed to make your survival experience feel more alive (and a little more dangerous).

## 🦁 Current Mobs
Check the **[HMobs Wiki](https://github.com/hotiovip/hmobs-wiki-issues/wiki)** for detailed info on behaviors, spawning, drops, and more!

- **Brown Bear** — strong and territorial  
  ![bears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5903cec14a1237fd310822e957f5977773086881.png)
- **Lion** — the king of the savanna  
  ![lions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88de5484c974ae9cd1ed2977fd949898ca6ea532.png)
- **Hyena** — cunning and pack-oriented  
  ![hyenas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a15f626e4ab49bf79708e98c7461dd5b6fd20961.png)
- **Zebra** — beatiful passive creature and pack-oriented
![zebra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c5a9468f0bf5282b486766e58c9968a5927e8d2.png)

## 🌍 Coming Soon
More wildlife species, improved AI, and biome-specific interactions — this is just the beginning!

If you're a fan of immersive exploration and dynamic nature encounters, **HMobs** will make every journey in your world unforgettable.
